title: /design:audit metadata omits the packet's required procedure-card surface
claim: /design:audit command metadata does not enumerate the design-audit procedure cards even though the packet makes procedure-card selection part of the runtime routing/proof contract.
counterevidenceSought: Checked taskProjections and choreography for procedures/ coverage; /design:audit only names SKILL.md, references/, shared sk_code_handoff, and harden/polish reference sources.
alternativeExplanation: Procedures may be treated as internal details delegated to SKILL.md, but SKILL.md makes procedure selection part of the routing/proof contract.
downgradeTrigger: Downgrade to P2 if metadata is explicitly scoped to public references and delegates all procedure-card discovery to SKILL.md.

title: AI-fingerprint routing lists a JSON registry that its own loader rejects
claim: The documented anti-pattern resource loader cannot load the machine-checkable AI fingerprint registry it promises to load.
counterevidenceSought: Markdown catalog and self-defect card exist, but the JSON registry remains listed in runtime RESOURCE_MAP while non-Markdown paths are rejected.
alternativeExplanation: The registry could be maintainer-only, but current SKILL.md presents it as a conditional routable resource.
downgradeTrigger: Downgrade to P2 if the JSON registry is removed from runtime RESOURCE_MAP and documented strictly as maintainer-only validation.

title: Audit report template requires a Python deterministic check despite the audit mode forbidding Bash
claim: The design-audit packet tells report authors to run a deterministic Python check for performance evidence while the mode's tool surface and direct-fallback contract forbid Bash/command execution.
counterevidenceSought: accessibility_performance.md allows static-risk labels when metrics are unavailable, but the report template still names a deterministic script check without marking it optional/offline.
alternativeExplanation: The check may be maintainer-side validation, but the template places it in the runtime report skeleton.
downgradeTrigger: Downgrade to P2 if the Python check is labeled optional/offline maintainer validation and a Read/Grep-only audit proof path is documented.

title: Procedure cards use broken sibling-mode relative links
claim: Two design-audit procedure cards point at sibling mode procedures with ../design-* paths that resolve under design-audit/ rather than to sibling packets.
